title: Lionfish displaying striped Fins Coloring Page

funFacts: The Lionfish displaying striped Fins is native to the Indo-Pacific but has become a highly invasive species in the Atlantic, devouring local reef fish.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing blending pastel shades using wax crayons or markers.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about advanced mechanical structure and shapes while developing fine motor coordination.
